name: skylight-mcp
description: Skylight Calendar MCP — read/write family calendar events, chores, rewards, and shared lists via Claude. Auth via email+password.

skylight_email.title: Email
skylight_email.description: Skylight account email. Required together with the password below.

skylight_password.title: Password
skylight_password.description: Skylight account password. Required only when the email above is set. Stored locally in the bundle config — keep it private.

tools.name: skylight_list_frames
tools.description: List all Skylight frames (family hubs) on the account

tools.name: skylight_get_frame
tools.description: Get details for a specific Skylight frame

tools.name: skylight_list_frame_members
tools.description: List members (users) associated with a frame

tools.name: skylight_list_devices
tools.description: List physical devices linked to a frame

tools.name: skylight_list_events
tools.description: List calendar events for a frame within a date range

tools.name: skylight_get_event
tools.description: Get details for a specific calendar event

tools.name: skylight_create_event
tools.description: Create a new calendar event on a frame (write)

tools.name: skylight_update_event
tools.description: Update an existing calendar event (write)

tools.name: skylight_delete_event
tools.description: Delete a calendar event from a frame (write)

tools.name: skylight_list_categories
tools.description: List event categories available for a frame

tools.name: skylight_list_source_calendars
tools.description: List external source calendars linked to a frame

tools.name: skylight_list_lists
tools.description: List all shared lists on a frame

tools.name: skylight_get_list_items
tools.description: Get items in a specific shared list

tools.name: skylight_create_list
tools.description: Create a new shared list on a frame (write)

tools.name: skylight_add_list_item
tools.description: Add an item to a shared list (write)

tools.name: skylight_update_list_item
tools.description: Update an existing item in a shared list (write)

tools.name: skylight_delete_list_item
tools.description: Delete an item from a shared list (write)

tools.name: skylight_list_chores
tools.description: List chores for a frame within a date range

tools.name: skylight_create_chore
tools.description: Create a new chore on a frame (write)

tools.name: skylight_complete_chore
tools.description: Mark a chore as complete for a member (write)

tools.name: skylight_list_rewards
tools.description: List rewards configured for a frame
